summary: The diff implements client-side filter/search functionality on the Dashboard page. All core acceptance criteria for REQ-1 appear to be addressed: keyword search (title, description, affected service), severity filter (critical/major/minor/informational), status filter (investigating/identified/monitoring/resolved), combined filters, independent filtering of active and resolved sections, a clear-filters button, and styling consistent with the existing design system using the card/border/input components.
